overview: PillTap is a small iOS app for quickly recording medication status.
audience: People who want a simple medication check record
Users who prefer a lightweight app over a complex health tracker
usage: Install PillTap from the App Store.
Open the app and record each medication event.
en.privacy: Check the App Store product page for the current privacy label.

faq.question: Is PillTap a medical device?
faq.answer: No. PillTap is a personal record app and does not provide medical advice.

ja.name: PillTap
ja.tagline: 薬の記録をすばやく残せるiOSアプリです。
